# Sample Project

Sample Project is a tiny fixture used by repo-health-inspector tests. It has enough
documentation, packaging, testing, and security metadata to look like a healthy Python CLI
without doing any real work.

## Installation

Install it from the repository root:

```bash
pip install -e .
```

## Usage

Run the sample command:

```bash
sample-project --name Ada
```

## Sample output

```text
Hello, Ada!
```

## Demo

The command above acts as a small terminal demo for the fixture.
